# zidl — C Backend Reference

Generated by `zidl -b c`. Produces a `.h` header (declarations) and a `.c` file
(CDR serialize/deserialize implementations). Both files share the same base name
derived from the IDL source file.

---

## Generated Files

| File | Contents |
|---|---|
| `<name>.h` | Type declarations, CDR function prototypes, include guards |
| `<name>_cdr.c` | CDR serialize/deserialize implementations |

`--split-files` produces one `.h`/`.c` pair per top-level named type.

---

## Type Mapping

| IDL type | C type |
|---|---|
| `boolean` | `uint8_t` (0/1) |
| `octet` | `uint8_t` |
| `char` | `char` |
| `wchar` | `uint16_t` |
| `short` / `int16` | `int16_t` |
| `unsigned short` / `uint16` | `uint16_t` |
| `long` / `int32` | `int32_t` |
| `unsigned long` / `uint32` | `uint32_t` |
| `long long` / `int64` | `int64_t` |
| `unsigned long long` / `uint64` | `uint64_t` |
| `float` | `float` |
| `double` | `double` |
| `long double` | `long double` |
| `fixed<D,S>` | `double` |
| `string` (unbounded) | `char *` |
| `string<N>` (bounded) | `char[N+1]` |
| `wstring` (unbounded) | `uint16_t *` |
| `wstring<N>` (bounded) | `uint16_t[N+1]` |
| `sequence<T>` | `typedef struct { T *data; uint32_t size; uint32_t maximum; } FooSeq;` |
| `T[N]` | `T name[N]` |
| `map<K,V>` | **Not supported** — error at codegen time |
| `@optional T` | **Deferred** — emits `/* TODO: @optional name */` |
| `enum` | `typedef enum { ... } Foo;` (CDR: `uint32_t`) |
| `bitmask` | `typedef uint8/16/32/64_t Foo;` (storage sized by `@bit_bound`) |
| `bitset` | `typedef uint8/16/32/64_t Foo;` |
| `struct` | `typedef struct _Foo { ... } Foo;` |
| `union` | `typedef struct { int32_t _d; union { ... } _u; } Foo;` |
| IDL module | C name prefix (e.g. `Ns_Foo`) |

Struct inheritance: base members are inlined as a first field named `_base`
(type `Base`), not via C inheritance.

---

## Generated File Structure

### Header (`types.h`)

```c
#ifndef PREFIX_TYPES_H
#define PREFIX_TYPES_H

#include <stdint.h>
#include "zidl_cdr.h"

/* Sequence typedef pre-declarations */
typedef struct { MyType *data; uint32_t size; uint32_t maximum; } MyTypeSeq;

/* Struct declarations */
typedef struct _MyStruct { ... } MyStruct;

/* CDR function prototypes */
int MyStruct_serialize(ZidlCdrWriter *w, const MyStruct *v);
int MyStruct_deserialize(ZidlCdrReader *r, MyStruct *v, ZidlCdrAllocator *alloc);

/* Key function prototypes (keyed types only) */
int MyStruct_serialize_key(ZidlCdrWriter *w, const MyStruct *v);
int MyStruct_deserialize_key(ZidlCdrReader *r, MyStruct *v);
int MyStruct_compute_key_hash(const MyStruct *v, uint8_t hash[16]);

#endif /* PREFIX_TYPES_H */
```

Include guards use the pattern `#ifndef <PREFIX>_<NAME>_H` where the prefix is
set with `--header-guard-prefix`. Default: uppercase file name.

Use `--pragma-once` to emit `#pragma once` instead of `#ifndef` guards.  
Use `--extern-c` to wrap the header in `extern "C" {}` for C++ inclusion.

### Source (`types_cdr.c`)

```c
#include "types.h"

int MyStruct_serialize(ZidlCdrWriter *w, const MyStruct *v) {
    /* CDR serialize each member in declaration order */
}

int MyStruct_deserialize(ZidlCdrReader *r, MyStruct *v, ZidlCdrAllocator *alloc) {
    /* CDR deserialize each member; allocator used for strings/sequences */
}
```

---

## CDR Serialize/Deserialize Signatures

```c
/* Serialize v into the CDR writer w. Returns 0 on success, -1 on error. */
int Foo_serialize(ZidlCdrWriter *w, const Foo *v);

/* Deserialize from CDR reader r into v. alloc used for strings/sequences.
   Returns 0 on success, -1 on error. */
int Foo_deserialize(ZidlCdrReader *r, Foo *v, ZidlCdrAllocator *alloc);
```

---

## Key Serialization

For structs with `@key` members:

```c
/* Serialize key fields only as canonical PLAIN_CDR2 big-endian */
int Foo_serialize_key(ZidlCdrWriter *w, const Foo *v);

/* Deserialize key fields from a full CDR stream; non-key fields skipped */
int Foo_deserialize_key(ZidlCdrReader *r, Foo *v);

/* Compute RTPS key hash: key ≤ 16 bytes → zero-pad; > 16 bytes → MD5 */
int Foo_compute_key_hash(const Foo *v, uint8_t hash[16]);
```

---

## `zidl-cdr` Dependency

The generated `.c` file includes `zidl_cdr.h` and uses the following from `zidl-cdr`:

| Symbol | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `ZidlCdrWriter` | Write buffer with position tracking |
| `ZidlCdrReader` | Read buffer with position tracking |
| `ZidlCdrAllocator` | Callback allocator for strings/sequences |
| `zidl_cdr_write_*` | Typed write helpers (alignment, byte-swap) |
| `zidl_cdr_read_*` | Typed read helpers |
| `zidl_cdr_compute_key_hash` | RTPS key-hash rule implementation |
| `zidl_md5` | MD5 for keys > 16 bytes |

Compile the generated `.c` file together with `packages/zidl-cdr/src/zidl_cdr.c`.
Add `packages/zidl-cdr/include` to your include paths.

---

## Backend-Specific Options

| Option | Effect |
|---|---|
| `--header-guard-prefix <pfx>` | Prefix for `#ifndef` include guards |
| `--pragma-once` | Use `#pragma once` instead of `#ifndef` guards |
| `--extern-c` | Wrap header in `extern "C" {}` |
| `--export-macro <macro>` | DLL export macro applied to topic descriptor declarations |
| `--no-typesupport` | Suppress CDR serialize/deserialize output |

---

## Known Limitations

| Feature | Status |
|---|---|
| `map<K,V>` | Not supported — returns `error.MapTypeNotSupportedInCBackend` |
| `@optional` members | Deferred — emits `/* TODO: @optional name */` comment |
| `@optional` key fields | Deferred — key functions emit `/* TODO */` for optional key fields |
| `--pl-cdr` (PL_CDR emit) | Flag parsed but C backend does not yet emit PL_CDR functions |
| Union discriminant: complex types | Emits `/* TODO: unsupported discriminant */` |
| `--generate-interfaces`: complex-type adaptation | `emitImplOp` emits `/* TODO */` stubs |
